allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"मुझे सिरदर्द और थकान है","history":[],"language":"auto"}')
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('lang:',d['detected_language'],'| source:',d['source']\); print\(d['response'][:300]\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"I am having severe chest pain and cannot breathe","history":[],"language":"auto"}')
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('emergency:',d['is_emergency'],'| source:',d['source']\); print\(d['response'][:300]\)")
